# Project Roadmap

This roadmap defines the first phases for stabilizing the existing React frontend and Express backend workspace.

## Phase 01: Foundation
- Confirm local developer setup for frontend and backend.
- Document existing architecture and service boundaries.
- Establish planning files and state tracking.
- Identify quick reliability improvements.

## Phase 02: UX & Reliability
- Add frontend error handling and loading states.
- Externalize backend URL configuration and/or add a local proxy.
- Improve pagination UX and table behavior.
- Document startup and environment requirements.

## Phase 03: Testing & Quality
- Add unit/component tests for `/frontend`.
- Add backend tests for `/backend/api/records` and pagination.
- Introduce linting or formatting rules if missing.
- Validate codebase conventions against the current implementation.

## Phase 04: Developer Workflow
- Add root-level workspace orchestration or package management if needed.
- Add README and setup instructions at the root.
- Improve `.github` workflow documentation and project planning flows.
- Prepare the repository for future deployment or handoff.
